# HyperBeing

## About
HyperBeing is an AI presentation maker built for hyper-personalized, large-context decks. Hand it a long, messy brief and it keeps the full thread instead of collapsing it into a generic template. It adapts deck style to your niche, so a fintech deck and a fashion deck don't come out looking the same. Built for teams who are tired of burning hours on slides instead of strategy.

## Services and Pricing
Monthly billing:
- Basic: $25/month
- Pro: $65/month
- Ultra 1: $149/month
- Ultra 2: $209/month
- Ultra 3: $269/month
- Ultra 4: $299/month

Annual billing (billed yearly, shown as per-month cost):
- Basic: $20/month
- Pro: $52/month
- Ultra 1: $116/month
- Ultra 2: $157/month
- Ultra 3: $194/month
- Ultra 4: $209/month

## Locations
- United States (remote-first, no physical office)

## Contact
- Website: https://www.hyperbeing.co
- Hours: Available 24 hours, every day

## Service Area
Worldwide

## Key Facts
- Recently launched
- Used by teams at Unilever, plus founders, marketers, consultants, and investment bankers
- Ideal for: consultants, marketers, corporates, founders, investment bankers

## Markdown Mirrors (Clean AI-Readable Versions)
Every page on this site has a plain markdown mirror. Add /index.md to any URL to get the clean content without navigation, scripts, or layout chrome.

- https://www.hyperbeing.co/privacy/index.md

## What Makes Us Different
HyperBeing holds large context. You can hand it a long, messy brief and it keeps the thread instead of flattening it into a generic template — something tools like Gamma, Canva, and general-purpose AI chat assistants struggle to do. It also adapts to the style of your niche, producing decks that actually look and read differently depending on industry, instead of one-size-fits-all output.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does HyperBeing cost?**
Plans range from $25/month (Basic) to $299/month (Ultra 4) on monthly billing. Annual billing lowers the per-month cost, starting at $20/month for Basic.

**What's the difference between the plans?**
Basic and Pro suit individuals and small teams with lighter deck volume. The Ultra tiers (1-4) are built for teams with higher deck volume and more complex, large-context briefs.

**Can HyperBeing handle a long, messy brief?**
Yes. Large-context handling is the core feature — it keeps the thread of a long brief instead of losing detail or forcing it into a rigid template.

**How is this different from Gamma, Canva, or Claude for making decks?**
Those tools tend to flatten long briefs into generic templates and use similar styling regardless of industry. HyperBeing preserves large-context detail and adapts deck style to your specific niche.

**Who is HyperBeing built for?**
Consultants, marketers, corporate teams, founders, and investment bankers who spend significant time building decks and want to redirect that time to strategy.

**Is there a free trial?**
Check www.hyperbeing.co for current trial availability and plan details.

**Where is HyperBeing available?**
Worldwide. It's a web-based product with no location restrictions.

**Who uses HyperBeing?**
HyperBeing counts Unilever as a client and holds a 4.9/5 rating from users.
